sentences.english: My favorite day of the week is Friday.
sentences.korean: 일주일 중 가장 좋아하는 날은 금요일이에요.

sentences.english: I feel happy because the weekend is coming.
On Friday nights my family orders pizza and watches a movie.
sentences.korean: 금요일 밤에 가족이 피자를 시키고 영화를 봐요.

sentences.english: I can also stay up late because there is no school the next day.
sentences.korean: 다음 날 학교가 없어서 늦게까지 깨어 있을 수도 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
